title: How a godly man builds himself before he can lead anyone else
caption:
Chase God before you chase her.

Most guys have it backwards. They're working on what they look like to her before they've built anything real. The desperation is visible — she can feel it across a coffee table before you open your mouth.

The desire for a wife isn't wrong. The hunger that runs ahead of your character is the problem.

A man who can't sustain 15 minutes alone with God doesn't have much to lead anyone toward. Spiritual leadership flows from spiritual life. If it's empty in private, it will be empty when it counts.

Prove yourself faithful in what you've been given. Job. Reputation. Self-control. Build something solid. The 20s are for getting built — don't skip steps.

And then this: "Delight yourself in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart." — Psalm 37:4.

The desire isn't wrong. The grip on the timeline is. Trust his pace more than your hunger. The right woman recognizes a man at peace with God.

—

theme: He chases God, not a wife.
